---
layout: default
title: "BJP Secures Defectors for Rajya Sabha; Legislative Updates in Parliament"
date: 2026-07-10T06:58:59.827843+00:00
summary: "The BJP fields three former TMC leaders for Rajya Sabha bypolls, while Parliament passes the Transgender Persons Amendment Bill and debates women's reservation"
run_time_ist: "12:28PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 12:28PM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>BJP Rajya Sabha nominations:</strong> The BJP has fielded three former Trinamool Congress MPs—Sushmita Dev, Sukhendu Sekhar Ray, and Prakash Chik Baraik—for Rajya Sabha bypolls in West Bengal, just hours after they joined the party.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I5</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I6</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I7</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I10</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I11</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMigAFBVV95cUxPNzk1a2lVNGhuQTlmWUpNMGwzaDRQV0xpUlM5LWtjOU9jNXpsQmRadHliLVlzTl9xSGd1a1pvVlYwdmtTSC16UHpfdFlkdUMzb3F3SVE0dnI2bl9mNU8xbmZvZWhIZDNUcTBSa0c0clE3YlI4YUFkVDlnR1lYMU9aTQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I13</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I16</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Legislative developments:</strong> Parliament has passed the Transgender Persons Amendment Bill, 2026, while the Lok Sabha continues to deliberate on constitutional amendment bills aimed at providing reservation for women in the Lower House and State Assemblies.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuwFBVV95cUxOS1Y3RmZzYUVKcWZEU082Q3J2S210X3k5NEVLdmVkbTY2TlBsNFZIR2FoWFBrQTFaMDYwcXE3clIzTDN4VV83US1LUmxwd2FVeVZsNW5YeVZHU0ZMUnJLZjhTVjBnRFE2Y2ZpZTMtOWVqYU1TX3BNTHRvZjhscE1yT1JsRjVFYnFITm9GbVVkNEdkVjFrSTNvYldVUU1zSjlGaVZoZDE3T0x1Vmx5VW5ONnNvc0xxQU5kTlkw?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I12</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxPSTVKRHVGUXlhNjVqNEczYkNpd1NvbmRYOU5Fd2RIZjV3OHBob0owSzh3LVRXdUVqSDNVZTgtbVZlUG8ybS1wallfSVdTeTRtNENIU0lwV3piczdxV2NEVmE0WC1GSTQyMjR4dkNPb1pqblB2SzNHQjZBRWVXZHpPZXE2bVlQc3NGNEFJVU1NUHJMMFFqSkdRUVFFMGZNRUkzSTc0LXphM1JaLXM?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I14</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I15</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Kerala BJP internal issues:</strong> The national leadership of the BJP has intervened following allegations of poll fund misuse in Kerala, as the party simultaneously pursues tactical outreach to expand its regional vote base.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W4</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W5</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Political accountability:</strong> The Congress party has demanded that Union Minister Bhupendra Yadav accept moral responsibility following the removal of his aides, amid broader political tensions.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W7</a></span></li>
</ul>
